calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Melissa Moultie, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Vista Del Monte Apartments.
Gregory Harper representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Regina Wallace is present.
Jerome Schweich representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
